description: Overview of AWS MSK (Managed Streaming for Apache Kafka) CloudWatch metrics. Provides broker-level, topic-level, partition, consumer lag, and cluster health metrics.
title: AWS MSK Cluster

022a450c-8ccc-4c5e-bd1a-70656684df67.description: The deployment environment for the service.
022a450c-8ccc-4c5e-bd1a-70656684df67.name: deployment_environment
022a450c-8ccc-4c5e-bd1a-70656684df67.queryValue:
SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'deployment.environment') as deployment_environment
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day
WHERE metric_name like 'aws_Kafka_%'
GROUP BY deployment_environment

08e59f66-af77-4a7d-a72d-0da774afdab8.name: broker_id
08e59f66-af77-4a7d-a72d-0da774afdab8.queryValue:
SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'Broker ID') as broker_id
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day
WHERE metric_name like 'aws_Kafka_%'
GROUP BY broker_id

231701ac-f20a-4dc4-9391-902afe2e8156.name: topic
231701ac-f20a-4dc4-9391-902afe2e8156.queryValue: SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'Topic') as topic FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day WHERE metric_name like 'aws_Kafka_%' GROUP BY topic

394325e4-6fbe-45aa-9fe7-de17c8ebbe1f.name: consumer_group
394325e4-6fbe-45aa-9fe7-de17c8ebbe1f.queryValue: SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'Consumer Group') as consumer_group FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day WHERE metric_name like 'aws_Kafka_%' GROUP BY consumer_group
